text:
FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM
OF
NADIASTROLOGY
ENLARGED EDIDON
SIMPLIFIED PROFILE OF NADI SYSTEM
BY
R.G. RAO

FUNDAMENTALS OF
RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Dear Readers.
By His Grace many books have been made so far by
extracting the essence of Nadi System of Astrology.
But in this connection, many readers have expressed their
opinion that a book is essential considering the Fundamentals and
basic principles of Nadi System of Astrology, that in order to make
it easy for the study of other books also. Hence considering such
situations, I am bringingout this small edition of book for the benefit
of readers.
In this book it explains that how there is always
supernatural forces behind superstitious aspects. Also, prominance
is given while explaining the CAUSITIVITIES OF
PLANETS, CAREER ASPECTS AND MARRIAGE ASPECTS
(SAPTAMA BHAV A), and they are made with many examples,
and charts. Errors, if any had crept in during printing
may kindly be condoned. Our thanks to the Printers
M/s.
